description_long: This bungalow features a sprawling, single-story layout with a combination of flat and gently sloped roof sections, including a prominent green gable roof over the main living area. The structure is surrounded by a landscaped yard with several trees and small shrubs, enhancing its suburban character. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, with large windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light. A covered porch area is visible, providing a sheltered entryway and outdoor seating space. The property includes a driveway and a detached garage or carport area, suggesting accommodation for vehicles. The overall design is modern with clean lines, open spaces, and a focus on blending indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a green gable roof, large windows, a covered porch, and landscaped surroundings. The layout is open and spacious, with a driveway and detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and landscaped yard with several trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, driveway, and detached garage or carport.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, additional windows, and the full extent of the green gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more trees and a clear look at the side facade and garage area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
